_schema.description: Symbol configuration file for bot_symbols.json. This file supports `symbols` and `profiles`, where `profiles` can include custom personality settings, exit overrides, and reversal settings.
_schema.symbols: list of symbols to monitor (will be normalized to uppercase USDT pairs).
_schema.profiles.<symbol>.personality: optional personality label to manually apply (calm/balanced/aggressive/adaptive).
_schema.profiles.<symbol>.exit_overrides: optional object for symbol-specific exit tuning.
_schema.profiles.<symbol>.exit_overrides.tp_atr_: override TP ATR multiplier. If larger than base, this value is applied while keeping stop loss conservative.
_schema.profiles.<symbol>.exit_overrides.sl_atr_: override SL ATR multiplier. Larger values than base are ignored to prevent stop loss widening.
_schema.profiles.<symbol>.exit_overrides.hard_st: optional hard stop loss percentage override. Larger values than base are ignored.
_schema.profiles.<symbol>.exit_overrides.require: if true, TP override only applies when strong momentum is present.
_schema.profiles.<symbol>.exit_overrides.volume_: optional volume multiplier threshold required before applying TP exit override.
_schema.profiles.<symbol>.exit_overrides.momentu: optional recent return threshold required before applying TP exit override.
_schema.profiles.<symbol>.reversal_settings.trad: larger values require stronger trade signal to confirm reversals.
_schema.profiles.<symbol>.reversal_settings.volu: volume surge multiplier needed for reversal confirmation.
_schema.profiles.<symbol>.reversal_settings.pric: minimum price jump percent to trigger reversal detection.
_schema.profiles.<symbol>.reversal_settings.min_: minimum reverse move percent before reversal triggers.
